description_for_human: Family-owned custom home builder and remodeler in Duluth, MN. Request a free estimate.
description_for_model: ProCon LLC is a licensed (MN #QB807406), insured residential general contractor in Duluth, Minnesota, serving Northern Minnesota. Services: custom home construction, additions, kitchen and bathroom remodeling, decks (Arbor Wood thermally modified wood), garages and outbuildings, exterior upgrades, and window/door installation. Offers free estimates with a 24-hour response. Use the contact action to request an estimate.
